query:
SELECT d.id, d.title, d.source, d.channel, d.contactId, d.pipelineId, d.stageId, d.createdAt,
       c.name AS contact_name, c.email AS contact_email, c.phone AS contact_phone,
       ps.name AS stage_name, p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.contactId
LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.id = d.stageId
LEFT JOIN pipelines p ON p.id = d.pipelineId
WHERE d.source = 'wordpress'
ORDER BY d.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

       c.name AS contact_name, c.email AS contact_email, c.phone AS contact_phone,
       ps.name AS stage_name, p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.contactId
LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.id = d.stageId
LEFT JOIN pipelines p ON p.id = d.pipelineId
